nasb.text: And he went away and discussed with the chief priests and officers how he might betray Him to them.

esv.text: He went away and conferred with the chief priests and officers how he might betray him to them.

cnv.text: 他去與祭司長和守殿官商量怎樣把耶穌交給他們。

ccb.text: 他去见祭司长和圣殿护卫长，商议如何把耶稣出卖给他们，

csbs.text: 他去跟祭司长们和守卫长们商量怎样把耶稣交给他们。
